Affairs (VSPA) Post-Arrival Information The VSPA website has instructions and valuable resources, including how to get a Cal 1 Card ID, CalNet ID, and Berkeley email address. Getting Started Checklist . When you go to the Cal 1 Card Office to obtain

. When you go to the Cal 1 Card Office to obtain your Cal 1 Card ID, ask for a “CalNet Token.” This token will enable you to access various systems on campus. **Please pay the VSPA University Services fee as soon as possible. The Cal ID will be read

s fee as soon as possible. The Cal ID will be ready the day after you pay the fee. The VSPA University Services fee is required to have an active appointment. Building Access Cory and Soda Halls To gain access to Cory Hall and Soda Hall your Host Fac
